title: Dogfood: create run results template
description: Create docs/dogfood/tickflow-parallel-approvals/run-results-template.md. Provide a fill-in template for recording run ID, agent count, worktree paths, approvals, failures, timings, and follow-up issues. Include headings: # Run Results Template, ## Run Metadata, ## Wave Summary, ## Approval Outcomes, ## Follow-up Issues.
